message:
feat(ci): add Go kernel OpenAPI drift check and contract tests

Expands CI and RBAC to support beads operations and ensure OpenAPI spec stability.

**CI Workflow (.github/workflows/ci.yml):**
- Rename existing OpenAPI check to "OpenAPI drift check (TypeScript)" for clarity
- Add "OpenAPI drift check (Go Kernel)" step that:
  - Builds ntm binary
  - Generates OpenAPI spec from kernel registry: `ntm openapi generate -o /tmp/openapi-kernel-new.json`
  - Compares against checked-in `docs/openapi-kernel.json`
  - Fails CI with clear error message and remediation instructions if drift detected
  - Gracefully handles missing spec file (warning only)

**Contract Tests (internal/serve/openapi_contract_test.go):**
- `TestOpenAPISpecDeterminism`: Verifies spec generation produces identical output
  across multiple invocations for reliable CI diffing
- `TestOpenAPISpecTagsSorted`: Verifies tags are alphabetically sorted
- `TestOpenAPISpecPathsSorted`: Verifies paths structure is valid
- `TestOpenAPISpecAllOperationsHaveResponses`: Every operation has 200 response
- `TestOpenAPISpecAllOperationsHaveOperationID`: Every operation has operationId
- `TestOpenAPISpecAllParametersHaveSchemas`: Path params have schema definitions
- `TestOpenAPISpecNoEmptyPaths`: No empty path items in spec
- `TestOpenAPISpecMatchesCheckedIn`: Compares generated spec against
  `docs/openapi-kernel.json` if present (skips if file missing)

**RBAC Permissions (internal/serve/rbac.go):**
- Add `PermReadBeads` permission for read-only beads/issue access
- Add `PermWriteBeads` permission for creating/updating beads
- Grant read permissions to Viewer role
- Grant read+write permissions to Operator and Admin roles

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -60,7 +60,7 @@ jobs:
         with:
           bun-version: "latest"
 
-      - name: OpenAPI drift check
+      - name: OpenAPI drift check (TypeScript)
         run: |
           bun run gen:openapi
           # Strip generated_at timestamp before comparing (changes on every run)
@@ -72,6 +72,31 @@ jobs:
       - name: Validate OpenAPI
         run: bun run lint:openapi
 
+      - name: OpenAPI drift check (Go Kernel)
+        run: |
+          # Build ntm and generate kernel-based OpenAPI spec
+          go build -o ntm ./cmd/ntm
+          ./ntm openapi generate -o /tmp/openapi-kernel-new.json
+
+          # Compare against checked-in spec if it exists
+          if [ -f docs/openapi-kernel.json ]; then
+            echo "Comparing generated spec against checked-in docs/openapi-kernel.json"
+            diff docs/openapi-kernel.json /tmp/openapi-kernel-new.json || {
+              echo ""
+              echo "========================================================================"
+              echo "  ERROR: OpenAPI kernel spec drift detected!"
+              echo ""
+              echo "  The generated OpenAPI spec differs from the checked-in version."
+              echo "  Run: ntm openapi generate -o docs/openapi-kernel.json"
+              echo "  Then commit the updated spec."
+              echo "========================================================================"
+              exit 1
+            }
+            echo "OpenAPI kernel spec is up to date"
+          else
+            echo "Warning: docs/openapi-kernel.json not found, skipping drift check"
+          fi
+
   # ============================================================================
   # TEST - Unit tests with coverage on multiple platforms
   # ============================================================================

@@ -54,14 +54,16 @@ const (
 	PermReadWebSocket    Permission = "ws:read"
 	PermReadMail         Permission = "mail:read"
 	PermReadReservations Permission = "reservations:read"
+	PermReadBeads        Permission = "beads:read"
 
 	// Write/operation permissions
-	PermWriteSessions   Permission = "sessions:write"
-	PermWriteAgents     Permission = "agents:write"
-	PermWritePipelines  Permission = "pipelines:write"
+	PermWriteSessions     Permission = "sessions:write"
+	PermWriteAgents       Permission = "agents:write"
+	PermWritePipelines    Permission = "pipelines:write"
 	PermWriteJobs         Permission = "jobs:write"
 	PermWriteMail         Permission = "mail:write"
 	PermWriteReservations Permission = "reservations:write"
+	PermWriteBeads        Permission = "beads:write"
 	PermApproveRequests   Permission = "approvals:approve"
 
 	// Dangerous operations (require admin or approval)
@@ -84,6 +86,7 @@ var rolePermissions = map[Role][]Permission{
 		PermReadWebSocket,
 		PermReadMail,
 		PermReadReservations,
+		PermReadBeads,
 	},
 	RoleOperator: {
 		// Viewer permissions
@@ -97,13 +100,15 @@ var rolePermissions = map[Role][]Permission{
 		PermReadWebSocket,
 		PermReadMail,
 		PermReadReservations,
+		PermReadBeads,
 		// Operator permissions
 		PermWriteSessions,
 		PermWriteAgents,
 		PermWritePipelines,
 		PermWriteJobs,
 		PermWriteMail,
 		PermWriteReservations,
+		PermWriteBeads,
 	},
 	RoleAdmin: {
 		// All viewer and operator permissions
@@ -117,12 +122,14 @@ var rolePermissions = map[Role][]Permission{
 		PermReadWebSocket,
 		PermReadMail,
 		PermReadReservations,
+		PermReadBeads,
 		PermWriteSessions,
 		PermWriteAgents,
 		PermWritePipelines,
 		PermWriteJobs,
 		PermWriteMail,
 		PermWriteReservations,
+		PermWriteBeads,
 		// Admin-only permissions
 		PermApproveRequests,
 		PermDangerousOps,
